subject: fix(ci): trigger deploy workflow on main branch instead of master
body:
The deploy workflow was configured to trigger on pushes to 'master',
but the remote default branch is 'main'. The workflow never ran.

Tags: ci, deployment, github-pages
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: deployment
Semver: patch
